mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.uis_code, r.ip_version, r.ip_pattern, r.is_enabled, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM TBL_IP_AUTH_IP_RANGE r INNER JOIN TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER i ON r.uis_code = i.UIS_CODE WHERE r.is_enabled = true AND i.UIS_ZONE_FLAG = 'Y' ORDER BY r.uis_code, r.id
SELECT id, uis_code, ip_version, ip_pattern, is_enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM TBL_IP_AUTH_IP_RANGE WHERE uis_code = #{uisCode} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_IP_AUTH_IP_RANGE (uis_code, ip_version, ip_pattern, is_enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{uisCode}, #{ipVersion}, #{ipPattern}, #{isEnabled}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_IP_AUTH_IP_RANGE SET ip_version = #{ipVersion}, ip_pattern = #{ipPattern}, is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_IP_AUTH_IP_RANGE WHERE ip_pattern = #{ipPattern}
